title: Binding Manifest
description: A separate, human-reviewable, versioned, FIRST-CLASS deliverable mapping each RSG node to a data query against the new sources plus a rebind class. Inference PROPOSES the manifest; a human (or a cached prior manifest for a recurring template) amends it; every fidelity leg keys off it. The manifest, not per-run inference, is the product.

manifest_version.description: Semver of this manifest instance, bumped on every amendment. Versioning makes the manifest an auditable deliverable across recurring runs of the same template.

rsg_schema_version.description: The RSG schema version this manifest was built against. A change serializes and re-triggers Bet-1 smoke.

template_id.description: Stable template identity; matches the RSG template_id so a cached manifest can be reused for a recurring template.

format.description: Output format. HTML and Office are the ONLY output formats; Power BI is an input source.

bindings.description: One entry per non-static RSG node. V6 (manifest-completeness/coverage) proves every value-shaped output token is covered by a binding here.

anchor.description: Format-native stable node identity (mirrors the RSG anchor). Never a raw char-offset.

class.description: Rebind class. frozen carries no data_query. surgical/regenerate obey the zero-literal construction rule. needs-review blocks ship until a human signs off.

source.description: The new source this node rebinds to.

source_period.description: Reporting period of the bound value (e.g. 'Q4 2024'). Required for the period-coherence leg; null only for period-agnostic chrome.

pbi_route.description: For Power-BI-sourced bindings: xmla/rest data-read, or screenshot (fresh-captured image, always 'regenerate'). null otherwise.

data_query.description: Query that produces the new value for this node. null iff class is 'frozen' (frozen carries no data). For a PBI-sourced value the same query is V1's independent recompute path.

kind.description: dax = DAX over the Power BI semantic model (XMLA, or REST executeQueries fallback on macOS); screenshot-capture = fresh Service capture or user-provided image.

expression.description: The query text / cell reference / capture spec.

source_ref.description: Identifier of the new source the query runs against (dataset id, file, published-report URL).

allOf.description: frozen carries no data_query; every non-frozen class must carry one.
